creator: pho@login.dknet.dk
text:
When I try to boot with the boot floppy (kern.flp) on a Fujitsu ErgoPro
I get:

/boot.config -P
Keyboard: no
_
BTX loader 1.00 BTX version 1.01

It seems as though the whole floppy is read and then nothing happens.

I tried the same floppy on a Compaq Deskpro and booted without any
problems.

I'm currently running 3.1-RELEASE on the Fujitsu.
